response.justification: Bogdan has genuine geospatial experience through GISCollective and Green Map, and demonstrated ability to work with high-throughput distributed systems at Dunnhumby. However, the role requires modern C++ or Rust as its primary technical foundation, and the candidate's stack is overwhelmingly TypeScript and Node.js. C++ appears only in a six-month role from 2014–2015 and a bachelor's thesis project; there is no Rust experience at all. There is no evidence of routing or navigation pipeline work, tile generation, or the low-level systems programming the role demands.
strengths: Hands-on geospatial platform development with GISCollective and Open Green Map, including event-driven geo-data pipelines deployed on Kubernetes
Distributed systems experience processing millions of HTTP requests per second at Dunnhumby, including low-latency async I/O and high-performance caching in DLang
Multi-language background spanning DLang, C++, Java, Swift, and TypeScript, indicating genuine adaptability across technical stacks
concerns: No modern C++ or Rust experience; C++ is limited to a 6-month role in 2014–2015 and a thesis project — both over a decade old
No experience with routing, navigation pipelines, tiling systems, or processing raw map data for navigation use cases
Geospatial work targets NGO data collection and visualization, not high-performance routing tile generation or latency-critical map data infrastructure
